items.title: Double fault: Tiafoe's racket taken by fan during French Open celebration later returned
items.summary: American tennis star Tiafoe lost his racket while celebrating his French Open victory only to recover it after asking for it back on Instagram.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
